message:
refactor(tests): replace match-panic assertions with matches!() + if-let

Convert four test assertion blocks in src/ui/app.rs from the
match { Pattern => assert, _ => panic! } idiom to the more idiomatic
assert!(matches!(...)) followed by if-let destructuring pattern.

Affected tests:
- macro_file::test_key_event_serialization_roundtrip: Key event check
- macro_file::test_key_event_roundtrip_all_codes: Key event loop check
- macro_file (paste redaction test): Paste event check
- evidence_sink config test: EvidenceSinkDestination::File check
- resize evidence path comparison test: paired File destination check

The new pattern is functionally equivalent but produces better failure
messages (the assert! message fires on type mismatch, while the if-let
body handles field-level assertions) and avoids unreachable-arm
warnings from exhaustive match blocks in tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
